# At the End of All Things

> [!abstract] ⚪ Contract · Neutral

![[501053.png]]

---

**Side A**
You can only choose 2 starting heroes. They each get +4 threat cost, +1 WP, +1 ATK, +1 DEF, +1 hit point, and they each gain a resource icon matching the other hero’s printed sphere. They cannot gain resources from attachment card effects, and they cannot be healed.
**Action**: Exhaust At the End of All Things to deal 1 damage to one of your starting heroes and ready your other starting hero.
**Action**: Flip this card over. You cannot trigger this effect during the first 3 rounds.
**Side B**
Your starting heroes each get +4 threat cost, +1 WP, +1 ATK, +1 DEF, +1 hit point, and they each gain a resource icon matching the other hero’s printed sphere. They cannot gain resources from attachment card effects.
**Forced**: When this card flips to this side, add 3 resources to each of your starting heroes’ pools. Search your deck for 2 cards and add them to your hand. Shuffle your deck.

**Pack:** [[ALeP - The Nine are Abroad]] #53 · Limit 1 per deck
